description: MCP server for Unitrends Backup — appliances, jobs, recovery points, restores, alerts.
name: io.github.wyre-technology/unitrends-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Unitrends appliance or MSP Console (e.g. https://unitrends.example.com)
environmentVariables.name: UNITRENDS_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Verify TLS certificates. Set 'false' for self-signed appliances.
environmentVariables.name: UNITRENDS_VERIFY_TLS

environmentVariables.description: Transport mode for the server. Set to 'stdio' for local CLI use; the image defaults to 'http' for gateway hosting.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT

environmentVariables.description: Credential source: 'env' reads vars locally, 'gateway' expects header injection from the WYRE MCP Gateway.
environmentVariables.name: AUTH_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Log verbosity: debug, info, warn, error
environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL

title: Unitrends Backup
